listening.title: Listening: Describing a person
listening.transcript: My new classmate is tall and young. Her hair is long and straight, not curly. She is very friendly and kind to everyone in the class.

questions.question: What does the classmate look like?

listening.title: Listening: A busy week
listening.transcript: I have a lot of work this week, so I am busy. My brother has a calm personality; he is never nervous. He has clever ideas and he isn't lazy at all.

questions.question: Why is the speaker busy?
questions.explanation: "I have a lot of work this week".

questions.question: What is the brother's personality like?
